name: Raymond J. BRITTON, Jr., Appellant v. COMMONWEALTH of Pennsylvania BOARD OF PROBATION AND PAROLE, Appellee

ORDER
PER CURIAM.
AND NOW, this 19th day of October, 2010, the Order of the Commonwealth Court is AFFIRMED.
opinions.author: PER CURIAM.
